short.en: Eight-channel solenoid manifold, microcontroller, and a recipe book.
short.sl: Osemkanalni solenoidni razdelilnik, mikrokrmilnik in knjiga receptov.

description.en: Eight solenoid valves on a Keyto Fluid Technology manifold, a small reservoir array, and a controller that times each pour by volume. Built to demonstrate end-to-end product thinking: from fluid mechanics through firmware to a UI that lets a non-engineer pick a drink and watch it appear.
description.sl: Osem solenoidnih ventilov na razdelilniku Keyto Fluid Technology, majhno polje rezervoarjev in krmilnik, ki vsako natakanje časuje po volumnu. Zgrajen kot prikaz celotne produktne miselnosti: od hidravlike prek firmware-ja do uporabniškega vmesnika, ki neinženirju omogoča, da izbere pijačo in jo vidi nastati.
